name: Swiss Chocolate Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Dump pineapple with juice into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch pan. Spread evenly.
3. Dump in pie filling. Spread evenly.
4. Sprinkle cake mix evenly over cherry layer.
5. Sprinkle pecans over cake mix.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes or until set. Serve warm or at room temperature.
TIP: To make the traditional Dump Cake recipe, substitute Duncan Hines Moist Deluxe Yellow Cake Mix for the Swiss Chocolate Cake Mix.
